title: somewhere at the edge of the world
description:
wow… what a special place, and such a special time we had in Scarborough, a small seaside town just outside of Cape Town. Life feels slower and simpler here, and I truly savoured every moment. I’m so excited to share this video with you.. it felt like one I’ll always remember. sending you so much love x
